data.description: When a lease is created, clients provide agent identity metadata once at lease creation time. After that, when the lease is bound to a knot, Knots must use the identity stored on the lease to stamp any new note and handoff capsule metadata written through that lease. Knots should not persist `unknown` placeholders for these fields when lease identity is available, and clients should not need to resend identity fields on update operations or repair missing metadata when reading knot data.
